title: Indulgent Jamaican Rice Skillet
description: A funky, snappy one-pot Jamaican dish featuring the rich flavors of Parmigiano-Reggiano, crispy chicken skin, and a tangy beurre monte, made keto-friendly with reduced carbohydrates. It's perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat, then add the chicken skin and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken skin from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken breast from the skillet and set aside with the chicken skin.
Add the curry powder to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the onion, garlic, and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Stir in the beurre monte and Parmesan cheese, then reduce heat to low and cover the skillet with a lid.
Simmer for 18-20 minutes, or until the liquid has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Stir in the chicken skin and breast, then cook for an additional 2-3 minutes to heat through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
Let the skillet rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
